title: austroderia splendens
intro: Austroderia splendens, also known as 'Manna Grass', is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Austroderia splendens include relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and even providing antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
